Header.Description: s.数値指定 汎用 NAAAA 53x24

Text.val: ◆ 桁数チェック書式を取得

FormName.valUnicode: s.数値指定 汎用 NAAAA 53x24

ExpSyntax.val: Range (LastClicked (),'0','9') OR {0,10} AND LastClicked ()='-' OR {0,11} AND LastClicked ()='.'
Range (KbGet (0),'0','9') OR {0,10} AND KbGet (0)='-' OR {0,11} AND KbGet (0)='.'
